ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.original-stat: This page allows you to control your devices, however it looks like you have no devices set up yet.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.areas.sensors: For at vise temperatur- og fugtighedssensorer i oversigten og i områdevisningen skal du tilføje en sensor til det pågældende område og {edit_the_area} for at konfigurere relaterede sensorer.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.home.welcome_: Add lights, switches, sensors, or other smart home devices to get started.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.common_contro: Integrationen af brugsforudsigelse er ikke indlæst.
Her vil du snart kunne se de enheder, du bruger oftest, baseret på din aktivitet.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.home-other-de: There are no unassigned devices left. All devices are organized into areas.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.home-area.no_: Add your smart lights, switches, or sensors to this area to get started.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.confirm_delete: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette dette kort?
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.action_c: Er du sikker på, at du vil afvikle handlingen "{action}"?
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.no_entit: Der er ikke angivet en entitet til visning af dialogboksen med flere oplysninger
Der er ikke angivet en entitet, som skal slås til/fra
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.no_navig: Der er ikke angivet nogen navigationssti
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.no_url: Der er ikke angivet en webadresse, der skal åbnes
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.no_actio: Der er ikke angivet nogen handling, der skal køres
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.iframe.error_sec: Kan ikke indlæse iframes, der peger på websteder, der bruger {target_protocol} hvis ioBroker kører med  {context_protocol} .
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.recovery-mode.de: ioBroker stødte ind i problemer under indlæsningen af din konfiguration og kører nu i gendannelsestilstand. Tag et kig på fejlloggen for at se, hvad der gik galt.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.no_data: Der er ingen data at vise. Det kan tage op til 2 timer, før der kommer nye data, efter at du har konfigureret dit energibetjeningspanel.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.no_data_p: Der er ingen data for denne periode.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.solar_con: This card indicates how much of the solar energy you produced was used by your home instead of being exported to the grid.

Hvis dette tal typisk er meget lavt, hvilket indikerer overskydende solenergiproduktion, kan du overveje at oplade et hjemmebatteri eller elbil fra dine solpaneler i perioder med høj solenergiproduktion.
Du har ikke produceret noget solenergi
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.self_suff: Dette kort viser, hvor meget af den energi, der forbruges i dit hjem, der kommer fra kilder i hjemmet (f.eks. solpaneler eller batterier).
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.grid_neut: This card indicates your grid energy usage.
If the needle is in the purple, you exported more energy to the grid than you imported from it. If it's in the blue, you imported more energy from the grid than you exported.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.carbon_co: Dette kort angiver, hvor meget af den energi, der forbruges af dit hjem, der blev genereret ved hjælp af ikke-fossile brændstoffer som sol, vind og atomkraft. Jo højere, jo bedre!
Forbruget af lav-CO2-energi kunne ikke udregnes
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.dom: All entities must be from the same domain. Found: {domains}
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.dev: All entities must have the same device class. Found: {classes}
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.no_: No data to display. All entities are hidden or have zero values.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.add: Add entities to display in the distribution chart
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.empty_state.no_d: Denne side giver dig mulighed for at styre dine enheder, men det ser ud til, at du endnu ikke har konfigureret enheder. Gå til integrationssiden for at komme i gang.

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.raw_editor.conf: Betjeningspanelet slettes permanent. Betjeningspanelet bliver automatisk regenereret for at vise dine områder, enheder og entiteter.

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_lovelace.e: Denne titel vises over alle dine visninger i dit betjeningspanel.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.visib: Vælg, hvilke brugere der skal se denne visning i navigationen
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.conve: Der oprettes en ny visning med brug af sektioner. Den nuværende visning forbliver uberørt. Alle dine kort importeres, så du frit kan omarrangere dem.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.card_: Konverter din visning til en sektionsvisning.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.secti: Du kan ikke ændre din sektionsvisning til en anden type. Start forfra med en ny visning, hvis du vil bruge en anden visningstype.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.dense: Vil forsøge at placere sektioner baseret så de passer i størrelse med andre sektioner. Dette kan gøre sektionernes placering mindre forudsigelig.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.top_m: Hjælper med at vise mere af baggrunden
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.show_: Show both icon and text title.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.subvi: Under-visninger vises ikke i faner og har en tilbage-knap.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.path_: Denne værdi bliver en del af URL-stien for denne visning.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.error: Du kan ikke gemme en visning med den samme URL som en anden eksisterende visning.
URL'en indeholder ugyldige/reserverede tegn. Indtast venligst kun en simpel streng for stien til denne visning.

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.save_config.par: This dashboard is currently being maintained by ioBroker. It is automatically updated when new entities or dashboard components become available. If you take control, this dashboard will no longer be automatically updated. You can always create a new dashboard in settings to play around with.
Er du sikker på du ønsker at tage kontrol over din brugerflade?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.save_config.yam: Du bruger YAML-tilstand for dette betjeningspanel. Det betyder, at du ikke kan ændre din konfiguration fra brugerfladen. Hvis du vil ændre dette betjeningspanel fra brugerfladen, skal du fjerne 'mode: yaml' fra din konfiguration i 'configuration.yaml.'
For at tage kontrol i YAML-tilstand skal du oprette en YAML-fil med det navn, du har angivet i din konfiguration for dette betjeningspanel, eller standard-'ui-lovelace.yaml'-filen.
For at hjælpe dig med at starte, er her den aktuelle konfiguration af dette betjeningspanel:
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.migrate.para_no: Dette element har ikke et ID. Tilføj venligst et ID til dette element i 'ui-lovelace.yaml'.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.migrate.para_mi: ioBroker kan tilføje ID'er til alle dine kort og visninger automatisk for dig ved at trykke på knappen 'Migrér opsætning'.

Kortet vises, når ALLE betingelser nedenfor er opfyldt.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.alarm-pane: This card allows you to arm and disarm your alarm control panel integrations.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.area.name: Område
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.area.alert: I kompakt format vises kun den første. Sortér advarsler efter prioritet.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.area.descr: This card automatically displays entities of a specific area.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.calendar.d: This card displays a calendar including day, week, and list views
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.conditiona: This card displays another card based on entity states.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entities.d: This card is the most common type of card. It groups items together into lists.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entities.e: View the details of this row by pressing the edit button
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entity.des: This card gives you a quick overview of your entity's state.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.empty_stat: This card displays a centered message with an optional icon and action buttons.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.button.des: This card allows you to add buttons to perform tasks.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.button.def: Standardindstillingen afhænger af entitetens muligheder, den vil enten være slået til, eller mere info-dialogboksen vil blive vist.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entity-fil: This card allows you to define a list of entities that you want to track only when in a certain state.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.gauge.name: Måler
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.gauge.desc: This card is a basic card that allows visually seeing sensor data.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.glance.des: This card is useful to group multiple sensors in a compact overview.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.grid.name: Gitter
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.grid.descr: This card allows you to show multiple cards in a grid.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.grid.title: Titel
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.logbook.de: This card shows a list of events for entities.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.history-gr: This card allows you to display a graph for each of the entities listed.
Udvid Y-aksens grænser, så de passer til data
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dat: This card allows you to pick what data to show on linked statistics graphs and other energy cards.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dis: This card shows how the energy flowed between energy sources and the home.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-usa: This card shows the amount of energy your house has consumed, and from what source this energy came.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sol: This card shows the amount of energy your solar panels have produced.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-gas: This card shows the amount of gas consumed per source.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-wat: This card shows the amount of water consumed per source.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.power-sour: This card shows historical power data.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dev: This card shows the energy usage per device, it is sorted by usage.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sou: This card shows all your energy sources and the corresponding amount of energy for each.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-com: This card shows which date ranges are being compared. It is hidden if comparison is disabled.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dev: This card shows energy usage per device over time.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-san: This card shows the distribution of energy in your home on a Sankey graph.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.power-sank: This card shows the real-time flow of power in your home.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.water-sank: This card shows the distribution of water consumption in your home on a Sankey graph.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.water-flow: This card shows the real-time flow of water in your home.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sol: This card shows how much of the solar energy was used by your home and was not exported to the grid.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sel: This card shows how self-sufficient from the grid your home is.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-gri: This card shows the balance between imported and exported grid energy.
This card shows your energy dependency on the grid.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-car: This card shows how much of the energy consumed by your home was generated using non-fossil fuels.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.statistics: This card allows you to display a graph of the statistics for each of the entities listed.
Udvid Y-aksens grænser, så de passer til data
This card allows you to display a statistical value of an entity of a certain period.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.horizontal: This card allows you to stack together multiple cards, so they always sit next to each other in the space of one column.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.distributi: This card displays multiple numerical entities as a proportional chart with an interactive legend.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.humidifier: This card gives control of a humidifier entity for humidifying or dehumidifying, allowing you to set its mode and desired humidity.

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.iframe.des: This card allows you to embed your favorite webpage right into ioBroker.

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.generic.co: Optional key to connect a collection of energy cards to any matching date picker. Energy cards on this dashboard with no key will automatically be linked together.
